chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1727 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.7451/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 05-05-2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that the petition may be disposed of with direction that the fate of the security shall be subject to outcome of the appeal pending before the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal. Petition is disposed of in the said terms. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
